sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT toRelativeYearNum(event_date) AS years_elapsed FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toDate('2000-01-01') WHERE event_date = toDate('2023-01-01');
SELECT toRelativeYearNum(toDate('2022-05-15')) AS y FROM test_dates;
